executives.name: Enrique Hernandez, Jr.
executives.background: Executive Chairman of Inter-Con Security Systems, Inc. Director since 2008.

executives.name: James Farley, Jr.
executives.background: Jim Farley is Ford President and Chief Executive Officer, and a member of the Board of Directors. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer and has held various leadership roles since joining Ford in 2007.

executives.name: John Rogers, Jr.
executives.background: Chairman, Co-CEO and Chief Investment Officer of Ariel Investments, LLC. He founded Ariel in 1983.
